locality.name: Berks County
locality.assessment_context: Last countywide reassessment effective tax year 1994 (reflecting 1993 market conditions). A median ratio of 0.30–0.40 is expected and legally defensible under Pennsylvania law. The PA STEB Common Level Ratio adjusts appeals to current market value annually.

modeling.__model_groups_note: Define your jurisdiction's property type groups. Each key is a group ID; 'name' is the human-readable label; 'filter' is a filter expression using openavmkit filter syntax. String literals in filters must use the 'str:' prefix. Example: {"res": {"name": "Residential", "filter": ["==", "class", "str:R"]}}

important.__note: Map openavmkit's standard role names to your jurisdiction's actual column names. See the nc-guilford example for reference.
